login.title: Choco Ops Login
login.subtitle: Sign in with a Supabase admin account to manage the chocolate shop backend.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage occasions, chocolate products, image assets, and customer orders from one protected admin workspace.
dashboard.snapshotText: Use Orders to review customer details and move orders through fulfillment.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Create and maintain occasions such as Wedding, Birthday, New Baby, and Events.
categories.name: Category name
categories.empty: No categories yet. Add the first occasion.
categories.deleteMessage: Delete "{{name}}"? Products linked to this occasion may need to be reassigned first.

productTypes.title: Product Types
productTypes.subtitle: Create and maintain product types used by the product form.
productTypes.name: Type name
productTypes.deleteMessage: Delete "{{name}}"? Products linked to this type may need to be reassigned first.

sections.title: Sections
sections.subtitle: Create and maintain product sections such as Men, Women, and Kids.
sections.name: Section name
sections.deleteMessage: Delete "{{name}}"? Products linked to this section may need to be reassigned first.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Manage chocolate boxes, hospitality items, pricing, categories, and product imagery.
products.empty: No products match the current filters.
products.typeRequired: Choose a product type before saving.
products.sectionRequired: Choose a product section before saving.
products.invalidImage: {{name}} is not a supported image file.
products.publicUrlError: Could not create a public URL for {{name}}.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Review customer orders, inspect ordered products, and update fulfillment status.
orders.searchPlaceholder: Search by customer, phone, or address...
orders.empty: No orders match the current filters.
orders.noItems: No order items found for this order.
